steps.title: Connect cause and result
steps.content: The first sentence says the center has cultivated a multigenerational community of Black creatives. The next sentence says it gained a reputation as a hub of Black art and culture. That reputation is presented as a result.

steps.title: Use a result transition
steps.content: Choice B and Choice C signal contrast or concession, but the ideas are not opposed. Choice D is about something happening at intervals, not logical connection. The transition must mean "as a result." The answer is A.
